name: streamlit-carousel-slider

metadata.name: streamlit-carousel-slider
metadata.summary: Carousel slider component for streamlit using React and tailwind with daisyui.

functions.name: streamlit_carousel_slider.streamlit_carousel_slider
documentation:
Carousel slider component entrypoint for streamlit using React and tailwind with daisyui.

```
param list[Image] images

A list of images to be displayed in the carousel.

return

Nothing to be returned.

rtype

None
```

classes.name: streamlit_carousel_slider.Image
documentation: An image to be displayed in carousel.
